column2: Since you are producing 4 specific topics, create a "Master Script" for each.
Video 1: The Roadmap (Upgrade): Step-by-step technical requirements.
Video 2: The Vision (Why): Emotional and financial benefits.
Video 3: The Strategy (Earn More): Advanced sales/growth tactics.
Video 4: The Standard (QC/Fresh Produce): Operational excellence.
Tip: Write scripts in 30-second "blocks." This makes it much easier to cut them into Shorts later without losing the context.
